title: cyperus rehmannianus var. bathiei
intro: Cyperus rehmannianus var. bathiei, also known as Bathie's flatsedge, is a species of sedge that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used in medicine for its various properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which are attributed to its rich content of sesquiterpenes and other bioactive compounds. The medicinal properties of Cyperus rehmannianus var. bathiei are believed to provide relief from fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as to aid in wound healing and skin infections. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used in traditional medicine to harness its medicinal benefits.
